description: Employer surfaces structurally cannot reach genetic data — no override, no admin escape hatch — and minimum-necessary purposes bind even clinical roles.

cases.name: an employer principal is denied genetic with the structural code (AC-2/AC-6)
an access override can NEVER grant the genetic segment (EX-3)
the employer surface refuses a metric outside its closed vocabulary
even a clinician is denied genetic under an operations purpose (minimum necessary)
